---

## Summary
What needs to be designed or decided?

## Context
Why is this design work needed now?

## Design Area
- [ ] Game mechanics
- [ ] Economy/balance
- [ ] UX/UI
- [ ] Content/data
- [ ] Art direction
- [ ] Audio direction

## Requirements
What constraints or goals must this design satisfy?

## Deliverables
What should come out of this task? (doc, mockup, data schema, prototype)

## References
Links, screenshots, or inspiration.
